phase2_reason: 指控 1 成立：验证确认 lfs/customer/forms.py 第 9 行使用 from captcha.fields import CaptchaField，且虚拟环境中执行导入命令返回 ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'captcha'。这是 Setup Agent 应安装但未安装的核心依赖，导致 228 个测试因导入错误而 ERROR。

charges.claim: Setup Agent 未安装核心依赖 captcha（django-simple-captcha），导致 lfs/customer/forms.py 无法导入，228 个测试因 ModuleNotFoundError 而 ERROR
charges.evidence:
依赖声明证据：/workspace/lfs/customer/forms.py 第 9 行硬编码使用 `from captcha.fields import CaptchaField`

取证命令 1: /workspace/venv/bin/python -c "from captcha.fields import CaptchaField"
输出 1: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'captcha'

取证命令 2: /workspace/venv/bin/pip show django-simple-captcha
输出 2: WARNING: Package(s) not found: django-simple-captcha

取证命令 3: cd /workspace && PYTHONPATH=/workspace:$PYTHONPATH DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=project.settings.testing /workspace/venv/bin/pytest /workspace/lfs/ --ignore=/workspace/lfs/integrationtests --ignore=/workspace/lfs/manage/tests_e2e --tb=line -q
输出 3: 109 failed, 1718 passed, 2 skipped, 72 warnings, 228 errors in 10.17s
错误详情：/workspace/lfs/customer/forms.py:9: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'captcha'
